settings.text_1: "As a dermatologist specializing in skin aging and barrier repair, I often see patients struggling with loss of elasticity, dehydration, and fine lines—especially as collagen production declines with age. I’ve reviewed the Anti-Wrinkle Collagen Mask, and I’m genuinely impressed by its formulation and results."
settings.text_2: Share positive thoughts and feedback from your customer.
settings.text_3: Share positive thoughts and feedback from your customer.

settings.heading: Most Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content:
Q: What should I do if the mask doesn’t stick well?

A: For best adherence, we recommend applying the mask to freshly cleansed, slightly damp skin. Take a moment to smooth it out gently, pressing down around the contours of your face. If needed, you can lay back and relax while it works its magic — the extra time also allows for deeper absorption. Some slip is natural due to the serum-rich formula, but that’s part of what makes it so effective at delivering moisture.

Q: What ingredients are in this?

A: Our Anti-Wrinkle Collagen Mask is formulated to deeply hydrate, smooth fine lines, and boost skin elasticity. Key ingredients include:

  • Collagen - Collagen helps improve skin elasticity and moisture retention.
  • Centella Asiatica Extract - It soothes inflammation and supports skin healing
  • Glycerin - It helps to hydrate, brightens, smooths skin, reduces pores, and provides antioxidant protection.
  • Butylene Glycol - Enhances the penetration of active ingredients and adds moisture to the skin.

The mask’s hydrogel base allows for slow-release absorption, helping the skin drink in every ingredient — not just sit on the surface.

Q: Is this vegan and cruelty-free?

A: We’re proud to say our mask is cruelty-free — absolutely no animal testing is involved at any stage of formulation or production.

While it does contain hydrolyzed collagen, which is not plant-derived, we source it responsibly from marine ingredients. We know terms like “vegan collagen” can be confusing — and while some plant-based ingredients can help support collagen production, true collagen itself can only come from fish-based sources.

That said, we’re always exploring more sustainable innovations while staying committed to delivering results — and kindness — through skincare.

Q:  Do I need to sit still for 3–4 hours to get the best results?

A: Not at all! The mask is designed to move with you — most of our customers wear it while winding down for the night, whether that’s reading, watching TV, or getting ready for bed.

In fact, 78% of users wear the mask while they sleep, and many report up to 24% better hydration and visible skin smoothness when used overnight. The longer it stays on, the more time your skin has to soak in the benefits — all while you rest.

Q: Doesn’t collagen come from within? How can this penetrate the skin?

A: You’re absolutely right — collagen is produced naturally in the body, but production slows with age. Our mask uses hydrolyzed marine collagen, which is broken down into smaller peptides that are better able to absorb into the upper layers of the skin. It’s not about replacing collagen deep inside — it’s about supporting the skin’s structure, hydration, and visible bounce from the outside in.

Q: How long do the effects last after using the mask?

A: You’ll typically notice immediate hydration and visible plumpness right after use. With weekly application, many customers see more long-term improvements in firmness and glow. Think of it as part of your ongoing skincare ritual, not just a one-time fix.

Q: Can the same mask be used more than once?

A: We don’t recommend reusing the mask. It’s designed as a single-use treatment to maintain hygiene and ensure maximum potency of the ingredients. Once used, the mask has already released most of its actives into your skin.

settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.content:
We recommend using the mask 1-2 times per week for best results.

1️⃣ Prep – Cleanse your face & apply toner or serum.

2️⃣ Apply – Remove the mask from the pouch & peel off the protective foil.

3️⃣ Wear – Place it on your face & leave for 1-2 hours (or until transparent).

4️⃣ Remove – Gently take off the mask & pat in the extra essence.

5️⃣ Glow – Enjoy hydrated, plump, and radiant skin!

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
We do not include any harmful parabens or other nasties. We also NEVER test on animals.

  • Collagen - Collagen helps improve skin elasticity and moisture retention.
  • Centella Asiatica Extract - It soothes inflammation and supports skin healing
  • Glycerin - It helps to hydrate, brightens, smooths skin, reduces pores, and provides antioxidant protection.
  • Butylene Glycol - Enhances the penetration of active ingredients and adds moisture to the skin.

As with all skincare products, we highly recommend & urge you please patch test the mask serum on the skin of the arm or hand before using fully as some people are more sensitive than others or have allergic reactions to blends of ingredients.

settings.heading: Key Benefits
settings.content:
Soothes and Calms Irritated Skin: Helps reduce redness and discomfort while supporting a healthy skin barrier.

Refines Skin Texture:
Improves overall clarity and softness for a more even, radiant complexion.

Provides Deep Hydration: Delivers lasting moisture with a fresh, lightweight finish

Simple to Use, Perfect Fit: Designed for effortless application and a snug fit, so you can mask your way to perfection—no mess, no fuss.

Luxurious Ingredients You Can Trust: Packed with premium, skin-loving nutrients, free from harsh chemicals, for visible results you’ll love.

All-in-One Beauty Boost: Say goodbye to dryness, puffiness, and uneven texture—one mask does it all for a smooth, hydrated complexion.

settings.heading: Should I wash after the mask?
settings.content: No, it is not necessary to wash your face after use. The remaining serum can be gently massaged into the skin for extra hydration.

settings.heading: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.content: Yes! Designed to be gentle on the skin. Our mask does not strip moisture or dry out, making it ideal for all skin types.

settings.heading: Your Glow-Up Starts Here — Just Like Theirs
settings.sub_heading: Here's what some of them have to say about their favorite product

settings.text: Each component in our Anti‑Wrinkle Collagen Mask is carefully chosen—no fluff, no hype—just effective, clean skincare for visibly revitalized skin. This formula isn’t just about moisture—it also addresses aging concerns with botanically powered ingredients.

settings.title: Collagen
settings.text: Beauty & Mobility
settings.modal_text: Collagen supports your skin, joints, bones, hair, and nails by restoring strength, elasticity, and hydration. As we age, natural collagen declines—supplements help boost production, keeping skin firm, joints flexible, and hair and nails stronger.

settings.title: Centella Extract
settings.text: Skin Repair
settings.modal_text: Centella Asiatica extract helps your skin repair itself faster, boosts collagen for a firmer, smoother look, and soothes away redness or irritation — leaving your complexion calm, resilient, and revitalized.

settings.title: Glycerin
settings.text: Moisture Lock
settings.modal_text: Glycerin is a powerful humectant that draws moisture deep into the skin and helps maintain optimal hydration levels. In the Anti-Wrinkle Collagen Mask, it works alongside collagen and botanical extracts to soften fine lines, boost elasticity, and reinforce the skin’s natural barrier. This ensures your skin stays plump, smooth, and comfortable — both during the treatment and long after you remove the mask

settings.title: Butylene Glycol
settings.text: Moisture Booster
settings.modal_text: Butylene Glycol helps your skin drink in the mask’s active ingredients by improving their absorption, while also drawing in and holding moisture. This dual action keeps skin hydrated, soft, and primed to fully benefit from the collagen and botanical extracts in the formula.

settings.row_text: Experienced smoother texture and more hydrated skin with reduced dryness within two weeks.
Saw refined pores, fewer fine lines, and a radiant glow — especially around the eyes and forehead.
Noticed brighter and more even-looking skin after just one use.

settings.title: Science Backed Results
settings.text: Each mask is rigorously tested to meet dermatological standards, ensuring a safe and effective skincare solution.
settings.caption: *These results are based on feedback from customers who used the mask weekly as directed.

settings.title: Join the Thousands Who’ve Found Their Confidence Again 💕
Age Gracefully with the Power of Botanical Waters
settings.text: This anti-wrinkle collagen mask is infused with a botanical base of Centella Asiatica, Green Tea, Portulaca Oleracea, and Polygonum Cuspidatum. These plant extracts calm irritation, boost hydration, and deliver antioxidant protection—leaving your skin smoother, firmer, and visibly refreshed.

settings.title: Botanical Waters: Nature’s Answer to Aging Skin
settings.text: As skin matures, it needs more than moisture—it needs targeted care. This mask features a powerful blend of botanical waters that help calm irritation, restore hydration, and support skin’s natural resilience. With regular use, your complexion appears smoother, firmer, and visibly refreshed.

settings.title: Soothing Hydration
settings.text: This mask delivers deep hydration while calming visible signs of stress and sensitivity that often come with age. The refreshing essence absorbs easily, enveloping your skin in lasting moisture and comfort—leaving it calm, nourished, and visibly radiant. Perfect for mature, dry, or tired skin in need of a gentle, revitalizing boost.

settings.title: Brighten & Smooth Fine Lines
settings.text: Aging skin often reveals fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven texture—signs that call for targeted care. This mask blends deeply hydrating botanicals with revitalizing actives to help soften wrinkles, smooth skin texture, and restore a more radiant, youthful look.
Clinically selected to Boost Elasticity, Hydration & Glow

settings.title: Low-Molecular Weight Collagen
settings.text: Minimizes pores and increases skin elasticity. Helps restore firmness for a smoother, youthful-looking complexion.

settings.title: Niacinamide
settings.text: Brightens the skin and improves wrinkles. ⁠It also strengthens the skin barrier, helping to reduce redness and uneven tone while smoothing out fine lines for a more even, youthful look.

settings.title: Galactomyces
settings.text: Improves skin tone and texture. Packed with antioxidants, it helps revitalize dull, tired-looking skin and enhances radiance, especially for skin that has lost its youthful glow.

settings.title: Oligo Hyaluronic Acid
settings.text: ⁠Penetrates into deeper layers of the skin to provide hydration. Deep hydration plumps up the skin from within, reducing dryness and the crepey texture that often develops with age.

settings.title: Visible Results After One Use
settings.text: From dry, tired, or uneven skin to smooth, radiant, and deeply hydrated — our masks are made to transform mature skin. Our mask refines texture, calm sensitivity, and bring back that healthy glow your skin deserves.

settings.question: How do I use the Mask?
settings.answer:
🧴 Evening Routine: Cleanse and tone your face, ensuring your skin is free from oil and creams.

🎭 Application: Start with the bottom piece, followed by the top. Gently press for optimal adherence. Pro tip: Tilt your head back for a perfect fit.

⏳ Duration:

Express Glow: 1-2 hours

Maximum Results: Leave it on overnight (ensure it’s fully dry to prevent shifting).

💖 The Reveal: Gently remove the mask and pat the remaining essence into your skin. Pro tip: Use excess serum on your neck and décolleté.

settings.question: How many masks come in a pack?
settings.answer: Each pack comes with 4 masks. Each mask is single use. We recommend starting with 2 masks per week for a month in order to get your skin glowing fast and rejuvenated. After the first month, you can use one mask per week to maintain a healthy skin.

settings.question: How often & how long should I use it?
settings.answer:
Use the mask 1-2 times per week for the best results. Regular use will maximize the benefits of firming, hydration, and brightening.

Leave the mask on for at least 60 minutes, but preferably 3-4 hours. The mask gradually becomes transparent, indicating that the nutrients are being absorbed.

For the best results, use it as a sleeping mask overnight. It does not leave any residue on your pillow.

settings.question: Can I use the mask alongside my other skincare products?
settings.answer: Yes, the Anti-Wrinkle mask can be used in your existing skincare routine. However, we recommend testing new products on a small patch of skin to ensure they are suitable for your skin.

settings.question: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Designed to be gentle on the skin. Our mask does not strip moisture or dry out, making it ideal for all skin types.

settings.question: Should I wash my face after using the mask?
settings.answer: No, it is not necessary to wash your face after use. The remaining serum can be gently massaged into the skin for extra hydration.

settings.question: What ingredients are in the mask?
settings.answer: Water, glycerin, propylene glycol, betaine, sodium carrageenan, polyurethane-35, glucomannan, 1,2-hexanediol, hydroxyacetophenone, butylene glycol, hydroxyethylcellulose, pentylene glycol, dipotassium glycyrrhizate, panthenol, potassium chloride, allantoin, tocopheryl acetate (vitamin E), niacinamide (vitamin B3), hydrolyzed collagen, hydrolyzed sodium hyaluronate, sodium hyaluronate, hydroxyphenyl propamidobenzoic acid, Glycyrrhiza Uralensis (licorice) root extract, Tremella Fuciformis (snow mushroom) extract, fructose, Centella Asiatica extract, phosphatidylcholine, phenoxyethanol, ceramide NP, copper tripeptide-1, beta-sitosterol, beta-glucan, sodium stearoyl glutamate, ethylhexylglycerin, caprylhydroxamic acid, acetyl hexapeptide-8, palmitoyl tripeptide-5.

settings.question: 100% Money back-guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer a 100% money-back guarantee. If you don’t notice healthier skin, we’ll give you a full refund. Plus, enjoy our 60-day risk-free guarantee for peace of mind.
